title: Opportunity Sizing Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger opportunity sizing foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Opportunity Sizing Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Opportunity Sizing Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good opportunity sizing foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Opportunity Sizing Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
